final:
module logic_circuit(
    input [7:0] obf_in,
    output [3:0] out
);

    assign out[0] = |obf_in[3:0];   // OR of first four inputs
    assign out[1] = &obf_in[3:0];   // AND of first four inputs
    assign out[2] = |obf_in[7:4];   // OR of last four inputs
    assign out[3] = &obf_in[7:4];   // AND of last four inputs

endmodule
